verses.text: Raise no false report; follow not a multitude to do evil. Truth and justice. Stand for right against the crowd.
Raise no false report; follow not a multitude to do evil. Truth and justice. Stand for right against the crowd.
Raise no false report; follow not a multitude to do evil. Truth and justice. Stand for right against the crowd.
Help even thine enemy's ox or ass gone astray or fallen. Love foes. Kindness reaches beyond friends.
Help even thine enemy's ox or ass gone astray or fallen. Love foes. Kindness reaches beyond friends.
Wrest not the judgment of the poor; take no bribe; oppress no stranger. Impartial. Justice must not be bought or biased.
Wrest not the judgment of the poor; take no bribe; oppress no stranger. Impartial. Justice must not be bought or biased.
Wrest not the judgment of the poor; take no bribe; oppress no stranger. Impartial. Justice must not be bought or biased.
Wrest not the judgment of the poor; take no bribe; oppress no stranger. Impartial. Justice must not be bought or biased.
Let the land rest the seventh year, that the poor may eat of it. Sabbath of land. God's rest provides for the needy.
Let the land rest the seventh year, that the poor may eat of it. Sabbath of land. God's rest provides for the needy.
Rest the seventh day; make no mention of the name of other gods. Rest and loyalty. Worship the LORD alone.
Rest the seventh day; make no mention of the name of other gods. Rest and loyalty. Worship the LORD alone.
Keep three feasts a year before the LORD. The feasts. Appointed times bind the people to God.
Keep three feasts a year before the LORD. The feasts. Appointed times bind the people to God.
Keep three feasts a year before the LORD. The feasts. Appointed times bind the people to God.
Keep three feasts a year before the LORD. The feasts. Appointed times bind the people to God.
Bring the firstfruits; 'thou shalt not seethe a kid in his mother's milk.' Firstfruits. Give God the best, in His way.
Bring the firstfruits; 'thou shalt not seethe a kid in his mother's milk.' Firstfruits. Give God the best, in His way.
God sends an angel to keep them in the way; obey his voice. The guide. God leads them to the promised land.
God sends an angel to keep them in the way; obey his voice. The guide. God leads them to the promised land.
God sends an angel to keep them in the way; obey his voice. The guide. God leads them to the promised land.
God sends an angel to keep them in the way; obey his voice. The guide. God leads them to the promised land.
Serve not their gods; serve the LORD, and He will bless thy bread and water. Blessing. Faithfulness brings health and plenty.
Serve not their gods; serve the LORD, and He will bless thy bread and water. Blessing. Faithfulness brings health and plenty.
Serve not their gods; serve the LORD, and He will bless thy bread and water. Blessing. Faithfulness brings health and plenty.
God will drive out the nations little by little, lest the land grow desolate. Gradual conquest. God's timing is wise and measured.
God will drive out the nations little by little, lest the land grow desolate. Gradual conquest. God's timing is wise and measured.
God will drive out the nations little by little, lest the land grow desolate. Gradual conquest. God's timing is wise and measured.
God will drive out the nations little by little, lest the land grow desolate. Gradual conquest. God's timing is wise and measured.
Their bounds are set; make no covenant with the nations or their gods. Separation. Compromise would ensnare them.
Their bounds are set; make no covenant with the nations or their gods. Separation. Compromise would ensnare them.
